title: Benedict Arnold and the Price of Treason
author: Roughdraft Stories
description: Benedict Arnold began the Revolution as one of the American cause's boldest officers and ended it as its most famous traitor. This factual narrative follows his courage, his bitterness, and the disastrous bargain that ruined his name.

chapters.title: A Bold Officer for a New War
The Grievance That Grew into Treason
West Point and the Name That Broke
